title: VIX-Rank Adaptive Fractional Kelly Sizer
summary: Replace Decifer's current static Kelly fraction with a dynamic fraction that scales inversely with VIX-rank (a normalised percentile of the VIX over a trailing 126-252 day window). During low-VIX periods the system bets closer to half-Kelly; during high-VIX spikes it automatically drops to quarter-Kelly or lower. This directly addresses the core weakness of the current implementation — Kelly is theoretically optimal only under known, stable probabilities, and Decifer's 9-dimension signal scores are noisy estimates that will systematically overstate edge during volatile regimes.
